title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as luffy and Chinjao fight with the weight of Garp’s past behind them, while Dressrosa’s hidden conflicts keep expanding outside the arena.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: TSUAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How Futille!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There it is!!! Defenses are useless against the finely mani- pulled attacks of hasshoken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Neither shields nor armor work against these guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The might of the Happou Navy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Boasts hundreds of years of storied history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: HQA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Indeed, no one can stand up to them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You'll have to try another time, greenhorns!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: OWAH HH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Taking your head, chinjo ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Will be much more meaningful than winning any tournament!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HiyaHAYA HIVA....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sawhere, you'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: UOHH H!!!!H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That was conque- Ron's Haki !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well duh... he was once a legendary pirate with a bounty of 500 min!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THERE'S ONLY ONE MAN I WANT!! DON'T GET IN MY WAY ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hold up, you bastard !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bounty Hunter JeanGango Jean The Bandit"

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: DEDEDEDE!! Thanks a lot, chinjao! Now I've got all the weapons I want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: @Gosh, I'm not sure if I'm

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: without falling to Don Chin- Jao's will ...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This tournament's dark horse is fishing for weapons in the ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's "Jean the Bandit"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's a bounty hunter who's earned the hatred of all the big name pirates throughout the new world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now that I've spotted you, you're finished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You sent a buddy of mine to the slammer! I'll never forget that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These weapons I've picked up are my "bullets"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm a sniper....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Uwah Hhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If your precious friend really went to prison, then show a bit more mettle and go get him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Like that one idiot did, two years ago!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
